Tips for an accessible design workflow

Before you design

While this may sound obvious, this most important thing to do before you design is to understand the overall goals for the project, who the target audience is and, crucially, what, if any, user research has been completed. Once you know this you are able to construct a framework within which the design can succeed.

In days gone by, a designer was required to learn and actively apply their knowledge of accessiblity as part of their day-to-day. Today, there are various tools to help.
